system.description:
Discipline: None
Skill: Large Ranged against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 8

With the wave of your hand you cause a heavy and cold wind to wash over your foes leaving them in a frozen state. Roll Large Ranged against the Evade of all foes in an 80-foot by 30-foot column before you. On a success those affected ender a frozen state (see next paragraph for duration). Their bodies are coated in ice and they experience no harm from the cold, but they are effectively paralyzed and not aware. On a Total Success the duration doubles. Note this does not work against opponents of equal or greater Qi Rank than yourself. For duration, this lasts 10 minutes if the target has fewer Qi Ranks than you. However if your Target has half as many Qi Ranks as you or less, the frozen state lasts for one day per your Rank of Qi. When this is the case they get one Endurance roll a day to break from the ice (the TN is your Resolve Rating). Note: Due to their resistance to cold and fire Attacks, this does not work on Immortals.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Targets enter frozen state: paralyzed and unaware, with duration based on relative Qi Rank
system.targetEffectsNote: Does not work against opponents of equal or greater Qi Rank.
